creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
I failed to apply the patch to the port of rrdtool 1.3.8. So I
submitted a patch from 1.3.9 to 1.4.2.


On Wed, 11 Nov 2009 05:10:19 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/rrdtool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/140466 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/140466
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
